{{Quote|I never thought I'd get my hands on one of these!|Maj, getting a hold of Ki-Adi-Mundi's lightsaber|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 1">[[Star Wars (1998) 1|''Star Wars'' (1998) 1]]</ref>}}
'''Maj-Odo-Nomor''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] from [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] who served as a member of the [[Techrats]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|No one's blowing me up, tuskface!… Ugggh!|Maj's final words, moments before being shot by Ephant Mon|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 5">[[Star Wars (1998) 5|''Star Wars'' (1998) 5]]</ref>}}
Maj Odo-Nomor was a member of the [[Techrats]], a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] that worked as a front for [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon's]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring. Shortly before his [[Death/Legends|death]], he was also romantically involved with [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] youngest daughter [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]]. He was among the many young people of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] who advocated the import of technology to Cerea, and favored Cerea's joining the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

Maj was present during a rousing pro-Republic speech by a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Bron (Human)|Bron]] during which [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] tried to match Bron in a debate. Ki's speech infuriated the mostly pro-tech crowd, which stormed the podium and began to beat Ki. During the scuffle, Maj grabbed hold of his Ki's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and inadvertently activated it, accidentally killing a bystander. Maj fled with his cadre of friends to the [[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadel]] to escape any possible arrest, where he met [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]].

The group hid in the citadel until Ephant Mon arranged transport off-planet. However, unbeknownst to them, a cargo of deadly [[divvik]]s was about to hatch on the ship. By the time they did, the group had huddled themselves into the one remaining escape pod. Using [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]] as bait, Ephant Mon devised a plan to have Ki himself save them. Once Ki arrived, and reached the pod containing the three Cereans and the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]], Ephant Mon gave him an ultimatum: engage the emergency release for the pod on his side of the door, or Mon would ignite the pod's boosters, which would destroy the pod and kill its four passengers. Hearing this, Maj attacked Ephant Mon, who responded by shooting and killing him on the spot.
